stories.title: CNN correspondent shares his takeaways from his recent visit to Iran
stories.description: NPR's Steve Inskeep asks CNN's Fred Pleitgen for his takeaways from his recent reporting trip to Iran.

stories.title: Exiled Iranians watch the war from afar, wondering what awaits when it ends
stories.description: Iranians who fled the country before the war with the U.S. and Israel are now watching it unfold, wondering what will happen when it ends.

stories.title: Despite Trump's frustration, Spain's Pedro Sánchez doubles down on opposing the war
stories.description: President Trump has been voicing his frustration with the Spanish government's opposition to the war in Iran. But far from backing down, Spain's prime minister is happy to walk into the spotlight.

stories.title: Khameni's killing raises old questions about U.S. assassinating foreign leaders
stories.description: The killing of Iran's Ayatollah Ali Khamenei raises questions about whether the U.S. as a democracy should be in the business of assassinating foreign leaders.

stories.title: Fear of Iranian mines in the Strait of Hormuz could further slow the flow of oil
stories.description: Attacks by Iran have already nearly halted the flow of oil through the vital waterway as commercial ship crews fear being hit by missiles, drones or mines.

stories.title: U.S. investigates strike on Iranian school as the war sparks a global oil crisis
stories.description: Trump, who promised to lower gas prices, is tapping the Strategic Petroleum Reserve as war drives prices up. And, the U.S. investigates the strike on an Iranian school that killed at least 165 people.

stories.title: 'There's no hiding place on a ship': The sailors stranded near Iran
stories.description: Drones, cruise missiles and fighter jets have become a common sight for many sailors stranded on ships in the Gulf.

stories.title: Bodies of 84 Iranian sailors killed in US torpedo strike to be repatriated
stories.description: The seamen died when Iranian warship the Iris Dena was sunk on 4 March by a US submarine near Sri Lanka.

stories.title: 'Follow the smoke': BBC spends day with emergency teams as Israel strikes south Lebanon
stories.description: The BBC visited the city of Nabatieh, witnessing the pace and scale of Israel's bombing as its war with Hezbollah continues to escalate.

stories.title: Mission accomplished? The 2003 boast that haunts today's Iran conflict
stories.description: The echoes between the conflicts are certainly there but there are also profound differences.

stories.title: Iran's new supreme leader vows to block Strait of Hormuz in first statement
stories.description: A message attributed to Mojtaba Khamenei also says Iran will continue targeting US bases in the region.

stories.title: Tracking the wave of ship attacks that has choked off Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: Six ships have been reportedly attacked in the Gulf in less than 48 hours, bringing the total vessels attacked during the war to 18.

stories.title: Emirati minister tells BBC Iran must end strikes on Gulf
stories.description: The UAE says more than 1,800 drones and missiles have been projected at the country since the war began.

stories.title: 'What if we're left with ruins?': Doubts creep in for Iranians who supported war
stories.description: Teachers, engineers and shopkeepers tell the BBC they fear Iran falling into chaos.

stories.title: Israel pounds Beirut suburbs and south Lebanon after Hezbollah rocket barrage
stories.description: Some Israeli strikes also hit other parts of the Lebanese capital, with 12 people reportedly killed along the seafront.

stories.title: How Iran war laid bare the world's reliance on Gulf oil and gas
stories.description: Countries around the world are feeling the impact of the conflict and the resulting energy price shock.

stories.title: British man charged in Dubai for alleged filming of Iranian missiles
stories.description: Foreign Office officials are understood to be supporting his family.

stories.title: 'Fingers on the trigger': Deadly warnings for Iranians being urged to take action
stories.description: Iran's police chief has warned that his forces would treat anyone taking to the streets "at the enemy's request" as an enemy.

stories.title: Questions mount for Hegseth over possible US involvement in strike on Iranian school
stories.description: Democrats have written to ask the defence secretary whether the US was responsible, but he says the issue is being investigated.

stories.title: Explosions reported on two foreign vessels in the Gulf, authorities say
stories.description: Pressure has intensified on the Strait of Hormuz, one of the world's most important shipping lanes, since Israel and the US attacked Iran last month.

stories.title: EU and UK demand Israel stop surge in West Bank settler violence since Iran war
stories.description: Six Palestinians have been killed during attacks by settlers in the West Bank since the start of Israel's war, the UN says.

stories.title: French officer killed in drone attack in Iraq
stories.description: A French officer was killed in a drone attack in Iraq, President Emmanuel Macron said on Friday, amid the ongoing conflict in the Middle East. Earlier the Iran-backed Iraqi group, Ashab Alkahf, warned that French interests in the region were now targets after the arrival of a Fre...

stories.title: 'Mental, subjective impact': Iran taking on 'American might' with cyberterrorism
stories.description: François Picard is pleased to welcome Farad Khajkvar, Director of Studies at the School of Higher Studies, EHESS, author of the forthcoming book in French, Iran: The End of Totalitarianism. He sees today’s Iran as a system in which religion has become subordinate to politics, and...

stories.title: War in the Middle East: New wave of attacks on Gulf states
stories.description: Iran launched multiple attacks early Friday on Gulf Arab states, including dozens of drones at Saudi Arabia, following warnings from its new supreme leader about hosting American bases, and US President Donald Trump threatened major new retaliation.

stories.title: French soldier killed in attack in Iraqi Kurdistan
stories.description: A French soldier was killed in an attack in Iraq's autonomous Kurdistan region, President Emmanuel Macron said on Friday, confirming the first French military death in the Middle East war. He did not say who was behind the attack. Since US-Israeli strikes on Iran last month engul...

stories.title: In first public comments, Iran’s supreme leader pledges to keep fighting
stories.description: Iran’s secretive new leader issued his first public statements Thursday, resolving to keep fighting, promising more pain for Gulf Arab states and threatening to open “other fronts” in a war that has already disrupted world energy supplies, the global economy and international tra...

stories.title: NOMA chef steps down after New York Times report of abuse
stories.description: PRESS REVIEW – Friday, March 13: We examine how the press is responding to Lebanon emerging as a new front in the US and Israel’s war against Iran. One paper describes the conflict in Lebanon as an extension of Israel’s war against Hezbollah. Also in the headlines: the chef and c...

stories.title: Middle East: Millions forced from their homes since the start of the war
stories.description: Up to 3.2 million people in Iran have been displaced since the Middle East war erupted, the United Nations refugee agency said Thursday and authorities in Lebanon say 800,000 have been forced from their homes as Israel’s military destroys buildings linked to Iran-backed Hezbollah...

stories.title: Zelensky arrives in Paris for talks on pressuring Russia
stories.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky arrived in Paris on Friday, his spokesman said, for talks with President Emmanuel Macron on ramping up pressure on Russia. The visit comes as talks brokered between Kyiv and Moscow by the United States to end the four-year invasion have been...

stories.title: 🔴 Middle East war live: Israel launches fresh round of strikes on Tehran
Zelensky in Paris to discuss increasing pressure on Russia as US peace talks stall
stories.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky will meet French President Emmanuel Macron in Paris on Friday to discuss ways to increase pressure on Russia to end its war in Ukraine. The meeting comes as US-brokered peace talks between Russia and Ukraine have stalled and the US said on M...

stories.title: Middle East war live: At least one dead in Tehran blast as UN chief pays ‘solidarity’ visit to Beirut
stories.description: At least one person was killed Friday in a massive explosion that shook central Tehran near a pro-government rally supporting the Palestinian cause, state media reported. The Israeli military had earlier told residents to leave two areas in the city centre. Meanwhile, UN chief An...

stories.title: Macron says officer killed in Iraq as pro-Iran group vows to target French interests
stories.description: A French officer was killed in a Shahed drone attack in Iraq, President Emmanuel Macron said on Friday, amid the ongoing conflict in the Middle East. Earlier the Iran-backed Iraqi group, Ashab Alkahf, warned that French interests in the region were now targets after the arrival o...

stories.title: US allows sale of Russian oil at sea as Middle East war sends energy prices soaring
stories.description: The United States will temporarily allow the sale of Russian oil already at sea, the Treasury Department said on Thursday, as energy prices surged after US-Israeli strikes on Iran triggered war in the Middle East. The license permits cargoes loaded by March 12 to be delivered and...

stories.title: Sri Lanka to repatriate remains of 84 Iranian sailors killed in US attack
stories.description: The 32 sailors who were rescued by Sri Lanka's navy will remain in the island nation, said the Foreign Ministry.

stories.title: Explosions near Tehran al-Quds Day march in solidarity with Palestinians
stories.description: State media outlet Press TV says one woman was killed from shrapnel as a result of a US-Israeli airstrike.

stories.title: Force majeure: What is it and why have some Gulf countries invoked it?
stories.description: Several Gulf nations have declared force majeure on oil and gas shipment since the US-Israel’s war on Iran was launched.

stories.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 14 of US-Israel attacks?
stories.description: Israel strikes Tehran as Iran retaliates across the Gulf; Hormuz disruption pushes oil prices higher and tensions rise.

stories.title: How Israel-US war on Iran puts $50bn in Indian remittances at risk
stories.description: The US-Israel war on Iran has caused gas shortages, while nine million Indian expats in the Gulf face uncertainty.

stories.title: Oil stays above $100 a barrel amid Iran’s stranglehold on Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: Energy markets remain on tenterhooks as the prospect of prolonged war in the Middle East grows.

stories.title: Iranian missile strikes residential area in northern Israel
stories.description: Video from northern Israel captured the moment an Iranian missile impacted in a residential area early Friday morning.

stories.title: Thousands rally in Athens protesting US-Israeli attacks on Iran
stories.description: Protesters in Athens have marched to the US Embassy to condemn the US-Israeli attacks on Iran.

stories.title: Netanyahu says Israeli strikes killed Iranian nuclear scientists
stories.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said several Iranian nuclear scientists were killed in Israeli strikes.

stories.title: Breakdown of diplomacy further complicates Iran nuclear issue, Pakistan warns Security Council
stories.description: Pakistan told the UN Security Council on Thursday that the breakdown of diplomacy in the Middle East has further complicated the Iranian nuclear issue, as Secretary-General António Guterres warned that the escalating crisis poses a “grave threat to international peace and securit...

stories.title: US vice president opposed Trump’s decision to launch Iran war — Politico
stories.description: JD Vance is "skeptical," is "worried about success" and "just opposes" the Iran war, the officials revealed

stories.title: US president gives no timeline for end of Iran operation in call with G7 leaders — Axios
stories.description: Donald Trump that the United States primarily needs to "finish the job"

stories.title: Iran attacks IDF headquarters in Beersheba area in Israel on March 13
stories.description: According to the statement, the strikes on other Israeli army facilities will further continue

stories.title: Attack on USS Abraham Lincoln, fears of migration crisis: Middle East conflict
stories.description: Some European countries fear that the US and Israeli military operation against Iran could trigger a massive influx of migrants, testing the European Union's reformed asylum system

stories.title: US burns through 'years' of munitions since start of Iran War — FT
stories.description: According to the newspaper, the rapid arms consumption is increasing pressure on the administration of US President Donald Trump

stories.title: Over 24,500 civilian facilities damaged in Iran by US, Israeli strikes
stories.description: Head of the Iranian Red Crescent Society Pir-Hossein Kolivand said noted that 4,511 commercial facilities had also been damaged

stories.title: Press review: US eyes unblocking Strait of Hormuz as Israel moves to expand ops in Lebanon
stories.description: Top stories from the Russian press on Friday, March 13th

stories.title: Neighborhoods in Tehran affected by US, Israeli airstrikes — news agency
stories.description: President of the Iranian Red Crescent Society Pirhossein Kolivand is visiting Bryank to oversee the distribution of aid to those affected

stories.title: Iran made it clear to Arab countries it is unwilling to end conflict with US — Axios
stories.description: The report indicates that Iran remains unwilling to de-escalate the conflict until it receives concrete international assurances that aggression against the country will not resume

stories.title: EU faces potential migration crisis amid US strikes on Iran — Politico
stories.description: According to Cyprus' deputy migration minister Nicholas Ioannides, such a crisis "might test the effectiveness of the bloc’s new migration and asylum rules"

stories.title: Moscow, Tehran maintain daily contact — Russian envoy to UK
stories.description: Andrey Kelin noted the strategic partnership between Moscow and Tehran

stories.title: Iran counts on BRICS to help stabilize regional, global situation — foreign minister
stories.description: Abbas Araghchi stressed the need for international and regional organizations to condemn the military aggression unleashed against Iran

stories.title: US-Israeli operation against Iran to last for at least another 2-3 weeks — media
stories.description: The officials are "accounting for the possibility US President Donald Trump makes an abrupt decision if he concludes his objectives have been met"

stories.title: FACTBOX: What is known about US softening of sanctions against Russian oil
stories.description: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent claimed that Russia would not benefit significantly from the temporary easing of sanctions

stories.title: Iran claims to have struck US aircraft carrier in Persian Gulf
stories.description: Iran’s IRGC said the US vessel had left the Persian Gulf and was fleeing back to the United States

stories.title: DPRK slams U.S. for orchestrating efforts to tighten financial sanctions against Pyongyang
stories.description: The Democratic People's Republic of Korea (DPRK) has slammed the United States for orchestrating efforts to tighten financial sanctions against Pyongyang.
